gist.headline: No Electron allowed
gist.blurb: Warden App just landed in the community showcase. It's a privacy-focused, native SwiftUI client for your AI needs, proving that not everything has to be a web wrapper.
gist.summary: Added Warden App, a privacy-focused native SwiftUI AI client, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Mac users get a lightweight, native alternative for chatting with Pollinations models without the overhead of Electron.
gist.visual_concept: Warden App implies security/privacy and native macOS (SwiftUI). Let's have Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot. The Monitor Robot is looking very sleek and metallic, holding a tiny shield to represent privacy. Polly is wearing a little security badge.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security badge, floating next to a chunky pixel robot with a sleek silver CRT monitor head. The robot is proudly holding a glowing green shield. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
